title: Strongest NGE being
wikitext:
[]: Strongest NGE being             Quote Post by TheMente » Sat Mar 08, 2014 7:07 pm I was talking to a friend about who is the strongest being in NGE. We listed some possibilities: Eva-01 after it acquired it's S2 engine and became a "God". GNR, which I think it's the most powerful, since it looks omnipotent. Rei/Lilith and Adam/Kaworu, which had the most powerful AT fields. What do you think? We didn't list FAR because we don't know enough about them and because they are in NGE 2 and not in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Mar 08, 2014 7:10 pm

[]:             Quote Post by TheMente » Sat Mar 08, 2014 7:15 pm Guy Nacks wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Mar 08, 2014 7:20 pm TheMente wrote: Isn't this supposed to be the serious forum?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Mar 08, 2014 7:42 pm GNR. She's not omnipotent but she's close. The ability to transcend time and space outdoes everything else.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 08, 2014 7:46 pm This really doesn't come off as a topic for serious discussion since these "most powerful" comparisons really are something for chit-chat. That being said, the most powerful being seen in-show is Giant Naked Rei. The most powerful being in the NGE universe? You'll have to ask Hideaki Anno that.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 08, 2014 9:34 pm EVA 01 post "completion". If we're talking Rebuildverse, however, it might be any being that obtains both a Lol and a LoC.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Mar 08, 2014 9:51 pm In NGEverse, it's got to be the FAR. I mean, nobody even comes close. In NME? I'm with Kendrix on this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Mar 09, 2014 11:56 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: In NGEverse, it's got to be the FAR. I mean, nobody even comes close.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Mon Mar 10, 2014 1:21 am Pen-Pen is the strongest guys.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 10, 2014 2:46 am Aiko Heiwa wrote: Pen-Pen is the strongest guys.
